headline: Does Strong Q1 Results And CFO Transition Change The Bull Case For Viatris (VTRS)?
summary: Viatris Inc. recently reported first-quarter 2026 results, with sales rising to US$3,509.7 million from US$3,243.2 million and net income improving to US$176.4 million from a net loss of US$3,042 million a year earlier, while reaffirming full-year 2026 revenue guidance of US$14.45 billion to US$14.95 billion and maintaining its quarterly dividend of US$0.12 per share. Alongside these results, Viatris announced the departure of Chief Financial Officer Theodora “Doretta” Mistras and the...
